description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark, likely metal exterior and a series of ten vertically stacked drawers on its front face. Each drawer is fitted with a small, rounded metallic handle, giving the cabinet a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain and unadorned, emphasizing its functional design. The cabinet's finish appears matte to semi-gloss, with a subtle sheen that suggests a powder-coated or painted metal surface. The overall structure is robust and boxy, suitable for storing documents or small items in an organized manner. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices, archives, or storage rooms in urban environments.
description: A tall, dark metal filing cabinet with ten drawers and rounded metallic handles, designed for organized storage. Its robust, boxy form and utilitarian finish make it ideal for office or archive use.
description_view_0: Front view showing ten drawers with metallic handles arranged in two columns.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, solid side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, solid surface.
